description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte metallic slide and a dark, textured grip. The frame features a prominent beavertail and a skeletonized trigger, while the slide has serrations at the rear for improved handling. The barrel is visible from the front, showing a standard round muzzle with no visible threading or compensator. The grip panels are contoured and appear to be made of a polymer or composite material, with visible fasteners and a subtle pattern for enhanced grip. The magazine base is slightly extended and beveled, providing a secure surface for reloading. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present on the slide, giving the handgun a clean and utilitarian appearance.
description: A matte-finished semi-automatic handgun with a dark, textured grip and a clean, unmarked slide. Features include a skeletonized trigger, contoured grip panels, and a beveled magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the slide serrations, beavertail, and detailed grip texture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round barrel muzzle, front sight, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour, magazine base, and the skeletonized trigger.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backstrap, hammer, and the alignment of the sights.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a contoured, ergonomic shape with a slightly flared base for improved control. Its surface is textured with a subtle, checkered pattern, likely made from a durable polymer or composite material. The grip panels are secured with visible fasteners and lack any prominent logos or embellishments, focusing on functionality. The backstrap is gently curved to fit the palm, and the front strap appears smooth, providing a comfortable yet secure hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded with a moderate thickness, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with a round muzzle and no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The exterior finish matches the matte appearance of the slide, and there are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with only the rear serrations providing visual detail.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly extended and beveled, with a flat bottom and subtle contouring for easier handling during reloads. It lacks finger rests, logos, or aggressive texturing, maintaining a streamlined and functional appearance.
